sqlMap.select: select * from BreakdownOfIntellPropLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and BOIPKey = #BOIPKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into BreakdownOfIntellPropLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey, BOIPKey PercentageValue LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #BOIPKey:NUMERIC# #PercentageValue# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, BOIPKey from BreakdownOfIntellPropLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and BOIPKey = #BOIPKey#
sqlMap.update:
update BreakdownOfIntellPropLW set
PercentageValue = #PercentageValue# PercentageValue = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and BOIPKey = #BOIPKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from BreakdownOfIntellPropLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and BOIPKey = #BOIPKey#
delete from BreakdownOfIntellPropLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and BOIPKey = #BOIPKey#
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, BOIPKey from BreakdownOfIntellPropLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and BOIPKey = #BOIPKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, BOIPKey, PercentageValue, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from BreakdownOfIntellPropLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and BOIPKey = #BOIPKey#
